title: Text account audit
summary: Will a text audit increase adoption of text best practice?
hypothesis: A numerical score provides clearer guidance on what constitutes good performance so that customers understand where they stand. That, combined with recommending personalized next steps based on account gaps, will drive higher completion of SMS best practices compared to generic checklists.
notes:
The Adoption team released the Text Performance Audit feature on 11/12/25 to 50% of accounts that meet the following criteria:

  • Has enabled SMS & has active sending number

  • Has collected at least 10 SMS subscribers

  • Has sent at least one live email (flow or campaign)

  • One of the following is true:

    • SMS Setup Guide has been dismissed by the user

    • SMS Setup Guide was created more than 90 days ago

Eligible accounts will receive a Text Performance Score based on the number of SMS best practices that have been completed, along with a list of recommended actions to improve the score.
Why? A sizable portion of accounts have set up SMS and moved beyond the initial setup guide, but are under-utilizing it - for example, 1/3 of paid SMS accounts do not send any SMS messages

Note: accounts that are newly enabling SMS will continue to see the SMS Setup Guide. This feature is only targeted towards those that are further along in their SMS journey.

PRD
